name: Suspicious ASP.NET Compiler Execution Detected
description: Detects the execution of `aspnet_compiler.exe` from unusual locations. While a legitimate tool, adversaries may use it to execute malicious code or obfuscate their activity. This activity should be investigated.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'aspnet_compiler.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the aspnet_compiler.exe executable. Expected to be an unusual path.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute aspnet_compiler.exe.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which aspnet_compiler.exe was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
